message:
fix(transport,combinator): wrapping-aware seq comparison, saturating arithmetic, retry budget off-by-one

aggregator.rs: use wrapping-aware seq_after() for reorder gap detection (MEDIUM),
saturating_add for effective_loss_rate and PathSetStats (MEDIUM+LOW).
retry.rs: fix total_delay_budget off-by-one counting extra delay beyond loop iterations (LOW).
Update 2 aggregator tests to reflect correct wrapping semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
